name: breaking-news@dscc.org
subject: CNN: "new health care bill Thursday"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
According to CNN, Mitch McConnell is releasing a new health care repeal bill Thursday, with a vote coming next week.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170711-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**CNN: New GOP health care repeal bill tomorrow, vote next week**_
Team,

According to _CNN_ , Mitch McConnell is planning to move forward with a "new health care bill Thursday, CBO score early next week and vote on motion to proceed mid next week."

**That gives us less than two weeks to stop the repeal effort** \-- and we know Mitch McConnell will be spending every second rounding up the Republican votes he needs to pass this disaster of a bill.

Make no mistake: he is negotiating in secret, using every dirty trick in the book to bring undecided Republicans on board. Meanwhile, we're fighting back with ads pressuring those same vulnerable Republicans to do the right thing -- and we're counting on your support.

[**We 've got to win this fight -- lives are _literally_ at stake -- and we have to do it before this disastrous bill comes up for a vote next week. Chip in $1 right now to help ramp up our ads and turn up the pressure before the vote.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170711-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

McConnell is doing whatever it takes to rally support -- whether it's cutting deals behind closed doors or adding amendments to win over Republicans who have been waffling. Right-wing special interest groups may even be strong-arming Republican holdouts with the threat of ads in their home states attacking them from the right.

That makes our ads even more important in shaping the health care debate and holding Republicans accountable for the damage this bill would cause for millions of working people.

**With a Trumpcare vote imminent, it 's never been more critical we stand united to defeat this bill. Pitch in $1 or whatever you can right now to stand with us in the fight for Obamacare:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/defeat-the-repeal-bill**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170711-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db6c/2b07114c/3f3104da/7311f23a/1113482262/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db6c/2b07114c/3f3104da/7311f235/1113482262/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db6c/2b07114c/3f3104da/7311f234/1113482262/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Why don’t they EVER listen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This is so necessary. So important. |
---
| | |

Peter,

Politicians have spent too much time bickering and not enough time listening. So today we're turning off that awful, blistering noise of Washington.

Instead, I want to hear from YOU.

I want to hear from the American heartland -- the REAL America that lives outside of the DC-media fantasy world.

**[With our six-month mark approaching, I want you to take the Listening to America Survey to tell me the true sentiments, concerns, and interests of REAL America.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99d68b36631910e65545e2c01dde1a0cab33f16d8e50baceef415f92f2a44d78aeb2a2a01ca10e7dcea5e6dcc5c6833e4424601e958d911e)**

The mainstream media and Hollywood dominate the airwaves and drown out the voices of the real hardworking Americans who make our country run.

They love to tell _you how you_ feel. Enough!

**The only person that can speak for you is YOU.**

Just like on the campaign, I always like to go directly to the people. I asked our supporters to help prepare for our three big debates against Hillary. I asked what issues we should address. I asked for help creating our platform. And I take our message straight to you through emails and social media.

**[So please take this moment to turn off the very loud noise of Washington and take the Listening to America Survey before our 6-month mark approaches.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99d68b36631910e613b88f7ed29fb5541590030c6030d2e8d6d8c6db7cf22d8f386ade65c702f4cdd57f7634b31927dd3bff000f705f5663)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99d68b36631910e620e25487c67243c9de09de49262000fec6075e24d6bf12505212fd446b91f5655a0eda8e840abf3c1a08deb0a0397580)
Donald J. Trump

---
[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99d68b36631910e6f38697af8de0829931dcce93d16f2553f754bfb4708f7b718019f88bdd958909ec5f81b612282ed09fa865a973683c73)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99d68b36631910e675c703aa15f98fdfcce02bf843d189ef5540822578f146c5abf7767854c7eb65eda75677ca27aed2c7e2d0fab865b601) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99d68b36631910e62c0ec8e3491db31b66023929757fab5c7a63c1e31407c6b24d09aa274c135796e178b61fdbd4802855e2fb8adcc465f8) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=99d68b36631910e6c9765a410c14257beedd0c7881ea59b10931bd98b1ab6727dad3dd02a34443ee32dff4f3f54985ce762e12530e26c7b4) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d484605ae5e8d3161684428bc8d8bdca906a9e4d2e72e375390d46e5343c9af99e087)
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Make the call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

The U.S. House of Representatives passed a version of TrumpCare earlier this year, but they will have to vote again if Republicans in the Senate ultimately pass their own bill.

Thousands of you have already called Congress to help us stop TrumpCare in its path. I want to take a moment to say thank you -- your work helped force Republicans to delay a vote on this horrible bill. But now, I'm asking you to step up one more time.

**I need your help to convince House members to do the right thing and vote against any bill that slashes Medicaid and undermines the protections of the Affordable Care Act.**

**[Find your representative here and call to make your voice heard on health care.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Tppg91v7AztOAX%2FgvB%2Bx1q5EBTiTSTGZ)**

I could give you numbers illustrating how bad TrumpCare is -- everything from how many millions of Americans will lose health insurance to how much premiums will go up. But we need to remember these aren't just numbers; these are real people who Republicans will be hurting if they pass their bill.

That's the message I hope you'll share with your representative.

Thanks for making the call,

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VUydGoUKiQi%2B17YgvRoMPK5EBTiTSTGZ)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jnuJoQOmWDRo7q832PCOLq5EBTiTSTGZ).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Democrats.org
subject: "Russia - Clinton - private and confidential"
body:
It's time for Trump to come clean.
---
**Donald Trump, Jr. met with allies of Vladimir Putin to get information to help his dad's campaign. It's time for Donald Trump and his cronies to come clean about their collusion with Russia. Add your name to demand answers.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Demand-the-Truth1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170712_joc_nd&source=em_20170712_joc_nd")**
Derek, we can say it with certainty: Donald Trump, Jr. knew the Russian government wanted to help his father win the election, and he welcomed their involvement.

Here's what happened. Don Jr. received an email with "Russia - Clinton - private and confidential" in the subject line. In it, he was offered "some official documents and information that would incriminate Hillary... and would be very useful to your father." And he knew it came from a source with close ties to Vladimir Putin.

But instead of reporting this obvious foreign interference in our presidential election to the FBI, Don Jr. said "I love it" and invited the Trump campaign's most senior aides to join him.

For months, Donald Trump has denied any connection between his campaign and Russia. But any reasonable observer -- not just Democrats -- could tell something was fishy.

Now we know we were right. There's no longer any question that the Trump campaign welcomed the opportunity to collude with Russia.

So it's time for Trump to come clean. What did he know about what his family and top campaign advisors were doing, and when did he know it?

**The future of our democracy -- and Trump's presidency -- rests on his ability to answer these questions. Add your name to demand the truth now:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Demand-the-Truth1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170712_joc_nd&source=em_20170712_joc_nd")**
Thanks,

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ae/4067b0a/37f54daf9/7e6ae6c4/4273566553/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170712_joc_nd&source=em_20170712_joc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ae/4067b0a/37f54daf9/7e6ae6c5/4273566553/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170712_joc_nd&source=em_20170712_joc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ae/4067b0a/37f54daf9/7e6ae6c2/4273566553/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170712_joc_nd&source=em_20170712_joc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ae/4067b0a/37f54daf9/7e6ae6c3/4273566553/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170712_joc_nd&source=em_20170712_joc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: Leader McConnell delays August recess
body:
This is the right decision for the American people.
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=af779f9721641e4489a40831e801e5eb4160f1de113343dafa1d5f60f9b8cf9ffa9ad2fbb5488d2b433fbde356d5c500faad90058e204f3d)**Yesterday, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell announced the Senate will delay the August recess** to work on critical issues facing the American people. This is the right decision for the American people, as Americans continue to suffer under Obamacare and need relief now more than ever. President Donald J. Trump remains committed to working with Congress to repeal and replace Obamacare and help fix America's broken health care system.
# Today's Events
**9:40 AM:** Vice President Pence delivers remarks at the National Student Leadership Conference**2:10 PM:** Vice President Pence arrives in Lexington, KY on Air Force Two**3:00 PM:** Press Briefing with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders **3:20 PM:** Vice President Pence participates in a healthcare listening session with small business owners **4:20 PM:** Vice President Pence delivers remarks at Bryant’s Rent-All**7:30 PM:** President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump depart Washington, D.C. en route to Paris, France
# Photo of the Day
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=af779f9721641e44b5aec6358a18df4e6ca8d21e77742ff3bceb796164fdbde6213091f35d713eaee3e58ed35f73b04d6d78c539c3c938be)**The White House** | June 14, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)
# OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY
**FACT:** Since 2013 [average premiums on the individual market in Alaska have tripled](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=af779f9721641e448cb486e972d7ea371e6c7a7794f34de9c0bb7ddf548a1d46108726e86c48c324741b254eeda64e9dac3fd93ecc7677cd) \- spiking by more than $8,000. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=af779f9721641e448cb486e972d7ea371e6c7a7794f34de9c0bb7ddf548a1d46108726e86c48c324741b254eeda64e9dac3fd93ecc7677cd)
# WHITE HOUSE UPDATES
**Vice President Pence[will travel to Kentucky today](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447ee3a8f1b8eae6571cd211f427f0a15effc68ff4dac8bcae6bfd462e44d853501e048c9d4738ce37a436b08fb8395cbd1c5)** to talk to small business owners about the need to repeal and replace Obamacare. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447ee89c229474f04958c8b73cf4cd37cf5377df31a2ec8f2a0075160e1a1424177ccb5695ad0042b25a1f5755624dd8ec1ab)**Today, President Trump will[ depart for Paris, France](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447ee5d8b57b24423581d153e0bdd0c0e2dda34c2783484f7fd521b687f990884abc1ad14aa991d701168b4f6712d5be99204) ** for meetings and celebrations with America's oldest ally. The President will attend France’s annual Bastille Day celebrations, commemorating the 100th anniversary of American troops in WWI. **ICYMI,[President Trump recently went to Poland](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447eea043bffd4759dd42de903c75753d9bfa38f9abad1595db8dd92ea30ee36adff8ca1463ecb7a287bb3c76a5d451c0705b)** and Germany for the G20 Summit. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447eee4f964a7e0cf1bc6d87735f64cd51e8e1b1945ae35e332f3449b0a5da663446c554972f0de1a1f9696ae655989de830c) [ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447ee12efdc4c8af2aa8733443436b76aef9e3cd4bae0791f8dbe9c42b365233da84bd1fb343061a7de01b8e1c0400403cff2)**Yesterday, President Trump[congratulated Prime Minister Haider al-Abadi of Iraq ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447eed953cda6bcece941f2d334870a186f989e050c5d04658359259aa209799b0c481a1737f2a46ed75604fc94db544c9deb)** on the liberation of Mosul by Iraqi Security Forces, which marks a major milestone in the fight against ISIS. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447ee36471ae9044ff3600e099373e29cc3bd01ce2aaa778b34d9cf447d9a701ee610965491ca57f43f747e609bda1fb3ec6b) [Senate Democrats have decided to obstruct President Donald J. Trump’s Administration, and the American people, ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447ee13e65405b4a5dbc61cd6449de6fe0ec99a697839a72720aee408207d8340c6b0014d413e65dde4206af82c98d6002742) by refusing to confirm President Trump’s qualified nominations. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc10a4091b4447ee1d0e770fe31f98c6b553d92107ee30f486906336da67da9df7adfed7caa815fd343402483d555711f7e76d74fcda7b65)
# West Wing Reads
Each day we put together a list of the top news stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you. **[Sign up](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53a2e6134c1b391054d9bb33329416b872da1e238aa574c64937409fd40b7af42cbaf841372ef4a612f9579439c877d5109b5b927964847f) to receive this daily update from the West Wing.**[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=53a2e6134c1b391054d9bb33329416b872da1e238aa574c64937409fd40b7af42cbaf841372ef4a612f9579439c877d5109b5b927964847f)
---

Trump remains committed to working with Congress to repeal and replace Obamacare and help fix America's broken health care system. name: Tom Perez
subject: SATURDAY: Join our national Resistance Summer Day of Action
body:
Commit to canvassing this Saturday.
---
Derek --

This Saturday, July 15th, we're doing something big: a national Resistance Summer Day of Action.

Democrats are hitting the pavement and going door-to-door in our communities, talking to our neighbors about the issues that matter in Virginia -- whether it's stopping the Republican health care repeal, fighting back against Betsy DeVos' attacks on public education, or supporting Democratic candidates who will take on the GOP.

**[Can you join the movement, Derek? Sign up to say you'll canvass in your community this Saturday with our new Knock 10 canvassing app.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ab/4067b0a/37e4e1ebc/7e6aee5e/171531/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/commit-to-canvass1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+join+the+movementCUSTOMDATASETsl&utm_campaign=em_20170712_tp_ne&source=em_20170712_tp_ne")**

Senate Republicans are back in Washington and getting back to work on health care repeal. If Trump and his Republican cronies in Congress win, millions of people will lose their health care and even more will see the costs of their care skyrocket.

And then it will be full speed ahead on the rest of the GOP's agenda in Washington and statehouses around the country -- so what we do this weekend couldn't be more important.

**It's up to us to stop them. So make this commitment today -- sign up to canvass:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ab/4067b0a/37e4e1ebc/7e6ae8f8/171531/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/commit-to-canvass1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170712_tp_ne&source=em_20170712_tp_ne")**
Thanks for being part of our Day of Action.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ab/4067b0a/37e4e1ebc/7e6ae8f9/171531/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170712_tp_ne&source=em_20170712_tp_ne"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ab/4067b0a/37e4e1ebc/7e6ae886/171531/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170712_tp_ne&source=em_20170712_tp_ne"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ab/4067b0a/37e4e1ebc/7e6ae887/171531/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170712_tp_ne&source=em_20170712_tp_ne") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232ab/4067b0a/37e4e1ebc/7e6ae884/171531/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170712_tp_ne&source=em_20170712_tp_ne"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: We're going exactly where Republicans are being the worst >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b9b/24c69fd9/cca8b8f7/18e665a8/2185502648/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact&source=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact")
---

Peter,

One-third of the Planned Parenthood clinics in Iowa recently closed.

Why? Because Republicans in the state legislature passed a law to defund them.

Republicans in North Carolina's state legislature are shrugging their shoulders at a law that says a woman can't revoke consent during sex.

And in New Hampshire, the state GOP was so eager to pass anti-choice legislation that they accidentally _made it legal for a pregnant woman to commit murder._

All of that was JUST IN JUNE.

State-level Republicans are continuing their relentless pace of attacks on abortion access, birth control, and women's rights, and we have to do something about it.

**[The best way to stop them? Replace them with pro-choice Democratic women. Donate $3.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b9b/24c69fd9/cca8b8f7/18e665a9/2185502648/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170711_email_StateLegRoundup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+The+best+way+to+stop+them+Replace+them+w&utm_campaign=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact&source=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact")**

These attacks on choice are a direct result of Republicans taking over state legislatures and governors' mansions across the country. Since _Roe v. Wade_ , states have enacted a shocking 1,142 restrictions on abortion, and nearly a THIRD of those have been passed in just the last six years.

Women need a strong line of pro-choice defenders who can fight back in state legislatures across the country, and we're ready to make that a reality.

More than 15,000 women have reached out to us about running for office since November, and we're determined to meet them where they are.

We're holding 25 trainings in cities across the country this year -- including in Iowa, North Carolina, and New Hampshire -- so our sisters in those states can start directly fighting back against these attacks.

**We know the resistance will be and must be local. Donate $3 now to recruit, train, and elect pro-choice Democratic women at the state and local level and stop the relentless attacks on choice:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/GOP-State-Attacks](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b9b/24c69fd9/cca8b8f7/18e665aa/2185502648/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170711_email_StateLegRoundup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGOPStateAttacks&utm_campaign=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact&source=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b9b/24c69fd9/cca8b8f7/18e665ab/2185502648/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170711_email_StateLegRoundup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact&source=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b9b/24c69fd9/cca8b8f7/18e665a4/2185502648/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact&source=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b9b/24c69fd9/cca8b8f7/18e665a5/2185502648/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact&source=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b9b/24c69fd9/cca8b8f7/18e665a6/2185502648/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact&source=WQEFE709N_digital_email_20170711_StateLegRoundup_inact"). name: Jay Inslee
subject: Do you like your internet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
If you want your internet to stay the way it is, we have to stop Trump now.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTE0NjE0MjIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMTA5MTIyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Dear Friend, If you like being able to stream TV shows, check your email, and post on Facebook without any roadblocks, I need you to help put a stop to the Trump administration's latest egregious action. The FCC, under President Trump's guidance, is threatening to destroy regulations that protect consumers from having unreliable internet access. Internet providers could force websites to pay more if they want people to be able to visit their sites without long load times. It means smaller companies could lose out to big companies who can pay for faster load times. It's unfair, and it'll make it even harder for small businesses to compete against massive corporations led by Trump's friends and donors. Today, hundreds of companies, organizations, and individuals are joining together to speak out for net neutrality. I'm joining them in calling for the FCC not to reverse these regulations -- but I need you to join us, too, so we can create a movement they can't ignore. [**Join me in supporting Net Neutrality Day and raise your voice for a free and open internet!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE0NjE0MjIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMTA5MTIyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Freedom of expression, innovation, and choice are what drive our economy -- and the internet has accomplished that by being an open platform. But thanks to Donald Trump, that's now all at stake. Through the internet, entrepreneurs have started small businesses, innovators have created online services, and webcasters have produced a new diversity of information sources. We cannot let winners and losers be decided by broadband providers, and that's why I'm asking you to join me today. [**Protect your internet today -- join Net Neutrality Day!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE0NjE0MjIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMTA5MTIyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTE0NjE0MjIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIwMTA5MTIyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=11461422&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTIwMTA5MTIyMAS2&l=6586026&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved
PO Box 21067, Seattle, WA 98111

The FCC, under President Trump's guidance, is threatening to destroy regulations that protect consumers from having unreliable internet access. Internet providers could force websites to pay more if they want people to be able to visit their sites without long load times. I'm joining them in calling for the FCC not to reverse these regulations -- but I need you to join us, too, so we can create a movement they can't ignore. Freedom of expression, innovation, and choice are what drive our economy -- and the internet has accomplished that by being an open platform. But thanks to Donald Trump, that's now all at stake. Through the internet, entrepreneurs have started small businesses, innovators have created online services, and webcasters have produced a new diversity of information sources. name: EMILY's List
subject: Put these women in the governor's seat >>
body:
|
---

name: Debbie
subject: our rights are at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend,

President Donald Trump has a long history of disgusting and sexist remarks directed towards women.

Women are strong and the weak man in the White House can't do anything to change that.

But the changes he is proposing do have harmful consequences to all of us. For instance, recently, he has his eyes set on disbanding the White House Council on Women and Girls. **And he doesn 't want to stop there.**

Trump's proposed budget would slash funding for the Women's Bureau at the Department of Labor and terminate the Office of Global Women's Issues at the Department of State.

These programs are instrumental in fighting for equal pay for equal work. They work tirelessly to tear down the barriers that are blocking opportunities for women here in the United States and abroad.

Defunding and disbanding women's programs doesn't make America great, **it turns back the clock for millions of women.** Instead of pulling women backward, we should be pushing forward for equal pay, equal opportunity, and equal rights.

[_**Don 't let Trump defund and disband these programs. Call on his administration to protect the programs and policies that defend women's rights.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ecc/622b7b5b/47bb23f/307bc2e7/1480655757/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170709")

I want young girls across the world to know that the future is theirs and that they can be anything they put their mind to. Instead, this administration is telling them that they aren't the priority.

And this isn't just about the message that Trump is sending to women and girls, but also to young men and boys. The way the President acts and speaks is NOT how a real man behaves.

[_**I hope you will stand with me and stand with millions of women as we march onward to protect our progress and advocate for women 's rights.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ecc/622b7b5b/47bb23f/307bc2e7/1480655757/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170709") | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ecc/622b7b5b/47bb23f/307bc2e7/1480655757/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170709")
---
Together we will keep fighting. And we will win.

Debbie

Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ecc/622b7b5b/47bb23f/307bc2e6/1480655757/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

For instance, recently, he has his eyes set on disbanding the White House Council on Women and Girls. And he doesn 't want to stop there. Trump's proposed budget would slash funding for the Women's Bureau at the Department of Labor and terminate the Office of Global Women's Issues at the Department of State. These programs are instrumental in fighting for equal pay for equal work. They work tirelessly to tear down the barriers that are blocking opportunities for women here in the United States and abroad. Defunding and disbanding women's programs doesn't make America great, it turns back the clock for millions of women. Instead of pulling women backward, we should be pushing forward for equal pay, equal opportunity, and equal rights. Instead, this administration is telling them that they aren't the priority. And this isn't just about the message that Trump is sending to women and girls, but also to young men and boys. The way the President acts and speaks is NOT how a real man behaves. "" | "" Together we will keep fighting. And we will win. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Greitens?=
subject: Missouri is open for business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
body:
Missouri has moved up 9 spots since Gov. Greitens took office. Open for details.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=361216c61f&e=84041254e6)

Peter,
We just received news that Missouri has jumped 9 spots in CNBC's "Best States for Business" after just a few months of Gov. Greitens' time in office!

**This is big news. **

Eric has honed in on policies that make Missouri a more competitive state for companies looking to grow and create good-paying jobs. And now, word is spreading that Missouri is open for business.
Our fight for more jobs and higher pay is just beginning. **[Pitch in $25 or $10 to now to help Eric 's efforts >>](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=cf062c82dd&e=84041254e6)**

\- Team Greitens

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=d4b71d8ede&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=9c3e7178a9&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=32e0eeb2be).
